description: Panel discussion on how compression technology will significantly reduce network costs for minting NFTs on Solana. The speakers, including representatives from Metaplex and Stardust, explain the technical advancements and potential use cases for scaling NFT minting from thousands to billions, emphasizing cost savings and efficiency.
topic_summary: Exploration of compression technology's impact on NFT minting costs on Solana, highlighting technical challenges and solutions, and discussing the future of scalable blockchain applications [t=125.45].
